stories: Good morning Sean, it's Saturday, the thirtieth of May, 2026
Fun fact: after Napoleon's victory at Friedland in 1807, he organised a celebratory rabbit hunt
The problem — his staff used tame rabbits instead of wild ones
When released, instead of bolting, they swarmed straight toward Napoleon by the hundreds
The Emperor of France had to retreat to his carriage
President Ramos-Horta delivers his special address this morning; President Tharman hosts the closing reception at the Istana tonight
On the economic side: April inflation came in at 1
8%, below the 2% forecast, with core at 1
Good morning Sean, it's Saturday, the thirtieth of May, 2026
Native sweat bees, completely harmless, but extraordinary in scale
Your calendar's clear today — it's Saturday, the day is yours
Today, Timor-Leste's President Ramos-Horta delivers a Special Address, and President Tharman hosts a reception at the Istana tonight
Forty-four countries, with sessions focused on Indo-Pacific security, Iran, and great-power competition
Weather: warm and humid, thirty-three to thirty-five degrees, afternoon thundery showers across parts of the island
US forces struck a military site near Bandar Abbas airport this week, threatening Hormuz shipping
Iran's Revolutionary Guard hit back at a US air base, and Kuwait activated its air defences
